sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_paths (id UInt32, file_path String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_paths VALUES (1, 'C:\Users\Documents\file.txt'), (2, 'some/long/path/to/test_file'), (3, 'no_slashes_here.txt'), (4, 'just/a/path/');
SELECT id, basename(file_path) AS file_name FROM test_paths;
SELECT id, basename(CONCAT(file_path, '/')) AS file_name FROM test_paths;
SELECT file_path, basename(file_path) AS file_name, now() + INTERVAL 1 DAY AS future_date FROM test_paths;
SELECT id, file_path, basename(file_path) AS file_name, now() + INTERVAL 10 MINUTE AS adjusted_time FROM test_paths WHERE basename(file_path) = 'file.txt';
SELECT id, basename(CONCAT(file_path, '/extra')) AS file_name FROM test_paths WHERE file_path LIKE '%/path/%';
SELECT id, basename(NULLIF(file_path, '')) AS file_name FROM test_paths;
CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_time DateTime, duration String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_time;
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (now(), '2 days'), (now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY, '3 hours');
SELECT event_time, duration, event_time + INTERVAL toUInt32(splitByString(' ', duration)[1]) DAY AS end_time FROM test_dates;
SELECT event_time, basename(concat(duration, '-event')) AS event_name FROM test_dates GROUP BY event_time, duration;
SELECT event_time, COUNT(*) AS total_events, MAX(basename(concat(duration, '-event'))) AS max_event_name FROM test_dates GROUP BY event_time HAVING total_events > 1;
SELECT now() AS current_time, basename(toString(current_time)) AS current_time_str, current_time + INTERVAL 5 SECOND AS future_time FROM system.numbers LIMIT 1;
CREATE TABLE test_joins (id UInt32, file_path String, timestamp DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY timestamp;
INSERT INTO test_joins VALUES (1, 'path/to/some_file.txt', now()), (2, 'path/to/another_file.txt', now() - INTERVAL 2 HOUR);
SELECT t1.id, basename(t1.file_path) AS file_name, t2.timestamp FROM test_joins t1 JOIN test_dates t2 ON t1.timestamp = t2.event_time WHERE t1.id = 1;
CREATE TABLE test_nulls (id UInt32, optional_path String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_nulls VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 'some/other/path.txt'), (3, 'More/Examples/NoSlashes');
SELECT id, basename(COALESCE(optional_path, 'default/path.txt')) AS file_name FROM test_nulls;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS files_count, basename(CONCAT(optional_path, '/default')) AS last_path FROM test_nulls GROUP BY last_path;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_intervals (start_time DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY start_time;
INSERT INTO temp_intervals VALUES (now()), (now() - INTERVAL 1 MINUTE), (now() - INTERVAL 30 SECOND);
SELECT start_time + INTERVAL 1 HOUR AS new_time, basename(toString(start_time)) AS time_str FROM temp_intervals;
